problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
